history.content:
<thought>
I am facing upward, and the cell directly ahead is a lava cell at row 06 column D, so moving forward would be fatal. The safe open space is to my right, so I should turn to face that direction and continue navigating around the lava.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
I am facing upward, and the cell directly in front of me is open, while the cell to my right is a wall. The left side appears blocked by lava nearby, so the safest immediate move is to go forward into the free cell.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am facing upward, and the cell directly in front of me is clear floor. Turning would not help immediately, while moving forward keeps me in a safe corridor and explores toward the open area above. I should advance one step.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I’m facing upward. The cell directly in front of me is a wall, so I can’t move forward. My left and right are both traversable: left is a safe floor cell, while I need to avoid the lava column farther left. Turning right will orient me toward the open path through column E side without stepping into lava.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 07 column D facing up, with a wall directly ahead at row 06 column D, so moving forward is blocked. The open cells around me are to the left and right on the same row, so I should turn to face a free path. Turning right will let me move along the open corridor.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
I’m facing upward, and the cell directly ahead is a safe floor. The cells to the right are lava, so I should avoid turning toward them. Moving forward keeps me in the safe corridor.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am facing upward with a wall directly ahead and lava immediately to my right, so moving forward would be blocked and turning right would face danger. The safest available move is to turn left, which should orient me toward the open floor cell on my left side.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_LEFT
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 07 column D facing up. The cell directly ahead at row 06 column D is a wall, so moving forward is blocked. The open cells to my left and right are both safe-looking, but turning right would face me toward row 07 column E, which is open and likely the best immediate move to explore around the wall.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
I am facing upward with a wall directly ahead at row 06 column D, so moving forward is blocked. The open safe cell is to my right at row 07 column E? Actually the cell immediately to my right in the local view is lava, so I should not move there. The only safe way to make progress is to turn left, so I can reorient toward the open floor cell on my left side.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_LEFT
</action>

<thought>
I’m facing upward, and the cell directly ahead is unknown, which may be safe but I can’t confirm anything better from this view. The only clearly navigable space nearby is to the left and ahead in the open row, so I will turn left to explore safely without risking the wall on the right.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_LEFT
</action>

<thought>
I’m facing upward, and the cell directly ahead is a wall, so I cannot move forward. The only immediate open direction in this local view is to turn toward the open corridor on my left/right side; I will turn right to reorient along the safe floor cells instead of the blocked wall.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
I’m facing up toward row 06, and the cell directly ahead is a wall, so moving forward is blocked. The safest visible open path is to my left or right along row 07. I will turn right first to face the open cell on my right.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
I am facing upward. The cell directly in front of me is a wall, so moving forward is impossible. The safest open path appears to be to my right, where there is a free cell. I will turn right to face that direction.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
I am facing upward, and the cell directly in front of me is a safe floor cell. The cells to my left are blocked by a wall column, so moving forward is the best immediate progress toward the open area above.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>
